Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Defendants Default Under Settlement And Release Agreement
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Continued To Jul-21-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ENTERING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO DEFENDANTS DEFAULT UNDER SETTLEMENT AND RELEASE AGREEMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Cavalry SPV I, LLC's motion for entry of default is continued for hearing to July 21, 2026, to enable plaintiff's counsel to obtain contact with her client or file a motion to withdraw as counsel. The failure to meet and confer about a hearing date does not provide a basis for denial of the motion. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Cavalry SPV I, LLC's motion to enter judgment pursuant to Defendant Eliana Bell's default under the parties' settlement and release agreement is DENIED without prejudice.
